items.explanation: The Simpsons was created by Matt Groening.

items.q: Which decade did Friends premiere in?
items.explanation: Friends began in 1994, placing it in the 1990s.
Chris Carter is credited with creating The X-Files.

items.q: Who revived Doctor Who for television in 2005?
items.explanation: Russell T Davies brought the series back to regular TV production in 2005 with Christopher Eccleston as the Ninth Doctor.
Shonda Rhimes is credited with creating Grey's Anatomy.

items.q: In what year did House premiere?
items.explanation: House is an American medical drama television series created by David Shore for Fox. It originally aired for eight seasons from November 16, 2004 to May 21, 2012.

items.q: In what year was Moana released?
items.explanation: Moana is a 2016 American animated musical adventure film produced by Walt Disney Animation Studios and directed by John Musker and Ron Clements from a screenplay by Jared Bush.

items.q: Which decade did Narcos premiere in?
items.explanation: Narcos began in 2015, placing it in the 2010s.

items.q: Which network originally aired Doctor Who?
items.explanation: Doctor Who is a British science fiction television series broadcast by the BBC since 1963. The series, created by Sydney Newman, C. E.
